# Hands-On RESTful API Design Patterns and Best Practices (Harihara Subramanian)

Before writing, modifying, or planning any code, you MUST use your `read_file` tool to load the relevant guidelines from `.roo/vendor/`. You may read multiple files if the task crosses domains.

## Table of Contents:
    - [Introduction to the Basics of RESTful Architecture](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/01-introduction-to-the-basics-of-restful-architecture.md): Web services, Web APIs, software architectures, specifically RESTful service communications, client-server interactions, data exchange over the World Wide Web (WWW), resource modeling, and HTTP-based network communications.
    - [Design Strategy, Guidelines, and Best Practices](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/02-design-strategy-guidelines-and-best-practices.md): Designing, reviewing, refactoring, or implementing RESTful APIs, web service architectures, URI routing, API payloads, HTTP interactions, or API documentation.
    - [Essential RESTful API Patterns](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/03-essential-restful-api-patterns.md): When the user requests to design, implement, review, or refactor RESTful API endpoints, particularly using Java and Spring Boot, or when evaluating REST API architecture, routing patterns, response formatting, and error handling.
    - [Advanced RESTful API Patterns](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/04-advanced-restful-api-patterns.md): Designing, implementing, refactoring, or reviewing RESTful APIs, with a focus on versioning, security/authorization, downstream service resiliency, data modification, endpoint deprecation/migration, and supporting heterogeneous client devices.
    - [Microservice API Gateways](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/05-microservice-api-gateways.md): The design, architecture, implementation, configuration, or debugging of Microservice Architectures (MSA), specifically focusing on API Gateways, service registries, service discovery, microservice orchestration, distributed system security, or the selection and configuration between API Gateways and Service Meshes.
    - [RESTful Services API Testing and Security](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/06-restful-services-api-testing-and-security.md): Designing, developing, testing, or reviewing RESTful APIs, including writing test automation, configuring API security, implementing authentication/authorization, mitigating web vulnerabilities, and architecting data access layers using the CQRS pattern.
    - [RESTful Service Composition for Smart Applications](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/07-restful-service-composition-for-smart-applications.md): Architectural design, system modeling, refactoring, or implementation of microservices architecture (MSA), RESTful API service compositions, Internet of Things (IoT) backend integrations, event-driven architectures, or decentralized data management strategies.
    - [RESTful API Design Tips](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/08-restful-api-design-tips.md): Design, architecture, integration, refactoring, documentation, or security auditing of RESTful APIs, API management platforms, or microservices integrations.
    - [A More In-depth View of the RESTful Services Paradigm](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/09-a-more-in-depth-view-of-the-restful-services-paradigm.md): The design, development, modernization, or architectural planning of RESTful APIs, microservices, cloud-native applications, legacy-to-cloud migrations, cyber-physical systems (CPS), and IoT integration (Device-to-Device [D2D] or Device-to-Cloud [D2C]).
    - [Frameworks, Standard Languages, and Toolkits](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/10-frameworks-standard-languages-and-toolkits.md): Assisting with the selection, design, scaffolding, or implementation of RESTful APIs and microservices in Java, Go (Golang), or Python, specifically involving framework selection, boilerplate generation, routing setups, database integrations, or applying framework-specific idioms for Spring Boot, Light 4j, Spark, Dropwizard, Gin-gonic, Revel, Django REST Framework (DRF), or Flask-RESTful.
    - [Legacy Modernization to Microservices-Centric Apps](.roo/vendor/architecture/hands-on-restful-api-design-patterns-and-best-practices-harihara-subramanian/11-legacy-modernization-to-microservices-centric-apps.md): Modernizing legacy applications, migrating monolithic applications to microservices architecture (MSA), containerizing existing legacy code, moving legacy systems to cloud environments (public, private, hybrid, or edge/fog), or restructuring legacy data access and batch processing systems.
